title: Systems, methods, and devices associated with supporting interdependent reconfiguration messages
abstract: A system include interdependent reconfiguration messages. For example, a WTRU may be configured to receive a first radio resource control (RRC) message. The first RRC message may indicate first configuration information and/or a first interdependency characteristic. The WTRU may set an interdependence RRC message timer based on an interdependence RRC message reception time duration. The WTRU may receive a second RRC message. The second RRC message may indicate second configuration information and/or a second interdependency characteristic. The WTRU may determine that the second RRC message is received before expiry of the interdependence RRC message timer. The WTRU may determine that message are interdependent based on the first interdependency characteristic and/or the second interdependency characteristic. Based on the interdependence RRC message timer and/or the first and/or second interdependency characteristic, the WTRU may update a parameter associated with the WTRU using the first configuration information or the second configuration information.
